name: ray
explanation: Ray exposes Prometheus metrics from its dashboard/metrics agent on a fixed default port (8080), as documented in the README sample (`http://<RAY_ADDRESS>:8080`) and the Docker autodiscovery snippet (`http://%%host%%:8080`). The check inherits `OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2` with a single `openmetrics_endpoint` field; no authentication is required. This is a canonical pattern A case: a generic OpenMetrics port-scan probing port 8080 for a Prometheus exposition format response is enough to identify a Ray cluster.
notes: Default Ray Prometheus port is 8080. Ray operators can override the metrics export port (`--metrics-export-port`), so port discovery should fall back to a small port-scan if 8080 is closed.
